en.question: A and B started a business by investing Rs. 5000 and Rs. 8000 respectively. At the end of the year, the profit was Rs. 2600. Find A's share.

hi.question: A और B ने एक व्यवसाय में क्रमशः Rs. 5000 और Rs. 8000 निवेश करके शुरू किया। वर्ष के अंत में लाभ Rs. 2600 था। A का हिस्सा ज्ञात करें।

en.question: A invests Rs. 6000 for 8 months and B invests Rs. 8000 for 6 months. In a profit of Rs. 840, find B's share.

hi.question: A, Rs. 6000 का 8 महीने के लिए और B, Rs. 8000 का 6 महीने के लिए निवेश करता है। Rs. 840 के लाभ में B का हिस्सा ज्ञात करें।

en.question: A, B, and C invest Rs. 5000, Rs. 6000, and Rs. 7000 respectively in a business. If the profit is Rs. 3600, find C's share.

hi.question: A, B और C एक व्यवसाय में क्रमशः Rs. 5000, Rs. 6000 और Rs. 7000 निवेश करते हैं। यदि लाभ Rs. 3600 है, तो C का हिस्सा ज्ञात करें।

en.question: A started a business with Rs. 8000. After 6 months, B joined with Rs. 12000. At the end of the year, the profit was Rs. 7000. Find A's share.

hi.question: A ने Rs. 8000 से एक व्यवसाय शुरू किया। 6 माह बाद, B ने Rs. 12000 के साथ जुड़ा। वर्ष के अंत में लाभ Rs. 7000 था। A का हिस्सा ज्ञात करें।

en.question: A and B invest in the ratio 2 : 3. After 4 months, A withdraws half his capital. If the annual profit is Rs. 5200, find B's share.
en.explanation: A contribution: 2x for 4 months + x for 8 months = 16x. B: 3x for 12 months = 36x. Ratio A:B = 16:36 = 4:9. B share = 9/13 x 5200 = 3600.

hi.question: A और B 2 : 3 के अनुपात में निवेश करते हैं। 4 माह बाद, A अपनी पूंजी का आधा निकाल लेता है। यदि वार्षिक लाभ Rs. 5200 है, तो B का हिस्सा ज्ञात करें।

en.question: Three partners share profits in the ratio 3 : 4 : 5. If the total profit increases by 25%, by how much does the second partner's share increase?
en.explanation: When total profit increases by 25%, each partner's share also increases by 25% since the ratio remains the same.

hi.question: तीन साझेदार 3 : 4 : 5 के अनुपात में लाभ बांटते हैं। यदि कुल लाभ 25% बढ़ जाता है, तो दूसरे साझेदार का हिस्सा कितने प्रतिशत बढ़ेगा?
hi.explanation: जब कुल लाभ 25% बढ़ता है, तो प्रत्येक साझेदार का हिस्सा भी 25% बढ़ता है क्योंकि अनुपात समान रहता है।

en.question: SI on Rs.34000 at 6% for 37 yrs?
Buy Rs.380, sell at 21% profit. SP?
Buy Rs.320, sell at 12% profit. SP?
A does work in 42d, B in 36d. Together?
Buy Rs.490, sell at 5% profit. SP?
Buy Rs.370, sell at 17% profit. SP?
A does work in 14d, B in 25d. Together?
SI on Rs.24000 at 20% for 19 yrs?
SI on Rs.8000 at 15% for 8 yrs?
SI on Rs.47000 at 21% for 12 yrs?
SI on Rs.18000 at 25% for 30 yrs?
A does work in 7d, B in 31d. Together?
A does work in 46d, B in 38d. Together?
SI on Rs.12000 at 11% for 33 yrs?
Buy Rs.100, sell at 13% profit. SP?
A does work in 31d, B in 19d. Together?
Buy Rs.400, sell at 11% profit. SP?
A does work in 27d, B in 37d. Together?
